input_fields.label: Industry
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. B2B SaaS, Fintech, Healthcare IT, E-commerce, Cybersecurity
input_fields.hint: Be specific. 'SaaS' is better than 'tech'. 'HR Tech for mid-market' is best.

input_fields.label: Target Role
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. VP of Sales, CTO, Head of Marketing, Operations Manager
input_fields.hint: Who is the person who would buy your product? Include their title and function.

input_fields.label: Location
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. United States, North America, EMEA, Global, New York + San Francisco
input_fields.hint: Where are your ideal prospects located? Narrower = more actionable results.

input_fields.label: Your Product / Service
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. AI-powered sales coaching platform that helps sales managers improve rep performance and reduce ramp time by 40%
input_fields.hint: Describe what you sell and the core value it delivers. Include the outcome, not just the feature.

input_fields.label: Your Goal
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Book 20 qualified demos in 30 days, Build a list of 500 targeted prospects, Close 3 enterprise deals this quarter
input_fields.hint: What specific outcome do you want from this prospecting effort? Be concrete.

input_fields.label: Target Company Size (Optional)

options.label: Let AI infer the best fit

input_fields.hint: Filter by company headcount. Smaller companies = faster sales cycles. Enterprise = bigger deals.

input_fields.label: Target Company Revenue Range (Optional)

options.label: Let AI infer the best fit

input_fields.hint: Revenue range helps identify budget availability and deal size potential.

input_fields.label: Target Tech Stack (Optional)
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, AWS, Shopify, Stripe
input_fields.hint: Tools your ideal prospect uses. Helps identify them via LinkedIn, G2, and enrichment tools.

input_fields.label: Excluded Segments (Optional)
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Agencies, freelancers, non-profits, companies under 10 employees, competitors
input_fields.hint: Who should NOT be on your list? This sharpens the output and saves you time.
